message:
fix: add toolchain/SCP guards to live build tests

Live SSH build tests (Darwin/Windows) fail-as-FAIL when remote hosts
are reachable but build prerequisites are missing. Add Go toolchain
check for mmini and SCP connectivity test for wlap so these correctly
SKIP instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-29b","title":"E2E: dsr build (real behavior)","description":"# E2E: dsr build (real behavior)

## Purpose
Exercise build command paths without mocks, using real local repos and dry-run/plan modes when external deps are missing.

## Approach
- Use a temp repo with a minimal workflow file for act.
- If docker/act missing, run `--dry-run` and assert planned actions.
- If docker/act available, execute a tiny workflow and verify artifacts.

## Logging
- Record repo path, workflow file, and tool config.
- On failure, dump act logs and stdout/stderr.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Dry-run produces deterministic plan output.
- [ ] Real run (when deps available) produces artifacts + manifest.
- [ ] --json output schema-valid.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T18:55:43.935502571Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T22:32:35.613198159Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T22:32:35.613178973Z","close_reason":"Created e2e_build.sh with 14 tests (9 passing, 5 skipped due to yq dependency). Tests cover: help output, missing tool error handling, dry-run mode, specific target builds, and JSON output validation.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-29b","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T18:59:35.186637406Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-29b","depends_on_id":"bd-f97","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T18:59:37.023320756Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-2kf","title":"E2E: dsr repos (real behavior)","description":"# E2E: dsr repos (real behavior)

## Purpose
Validate repos subcommands using real repos.d config files without mocks.

## Scope
- `dsr repos list`
- `dsr repos info <tool>`
- `dsr repos validate`
- `dsr repos discover --dry-run`

## Approach
- Use temp XDG_CONFIG_HOME with a minimal repos.yaml + repos.d fixtures.
- Validate that list/info output matches fixtures.

## Logging
- Print fixture paths and command lines.
- On failure, dump stdout/stderr and repo files.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All subcommands work with real files.
- [ ] --json output schema-valid and stderr clean on success.
- [ ] Errors on malformed YAML are clear and actionable.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T18:55:32.489262223Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T22:18:33.367087170Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T22:18:33.367068725Z","close_reason":"Created scripts/tests/e2e_repos.sh with 11 E2E tests for dsr repos command. 8 tests pass (help, list empty, list json, info json, info missing tool, validate json, error handling). 3 tests skip when yq not available (tests that need to parse YAML fixtures).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2kf","depends_on_id":"bd-1jt.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T18:59:31.579405945Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-2kf","depends_on_id":"bd-f97","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-30T18:59:33.403724219Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-2lm","title":"Test infrastructure: run-all-tests.sh runner script","description":"# Test Infrastructure: run-all-tests.sh Runner Script

## Purpose
Create a unified test runner that executes all tests with detailed logging, summary reporting, and CI-friendly output.

## Features

### 1. Test Discovery
- Auto-discover all test_*.sh files in scripts/tests/
- Support for --filter to run specific tests
- Support for --exclude to skip tests
- List mode: show discovered tests without running

### 2. Execution
- Run each test in isolated subshell
- Capture stdout and stderr separately
- Capture exit codes
- Enforce timeout per test (configurable, default 60s)
- Support for parallel execution (--parallel N)

### 3. Logging
- Per-test log files in logs/tests/YYYY-MM-DD/
- Structured JSON summary at end
- Human-readable progress output to stderr
- Color-coded results (pass/fail/skip)
- Verbose mode shows full test output

### 4. Reporting
- Total tests: run, passed, failed, skipped
- Duration per test and total
- List of failed tests with error snippets
- Exit code: 0 if all pass, 1 if any fail

### 5. CI Integration
- `--ci` mode for GitHub Actions
- JUnit XML output (--junit=path)
- TAP output format (--tap)
- Non-zero exit on any failure

## Sample Output
```
=== dsr Test Suite ===
Running 12 test files...

  test_logging.sh          8 tests  PASS  (0.4s)
  test_config.sh          12 tests  PASS  (1.2s)
  test_build_state.sh     15 tests  PASS  (0.8s)
  test_github.sh           6 tests  SKIP  (network)
  test_signing.sh          4 tests  FAIL  (0.3s)
    - test_sign_missing_key: Expected exit 1, got 0

=== Summary ===
Tests:   45 run, 39 passed, 1 failed, 5 skipped
Time:    3.2s

Failed tests:
  scripts/tests/test_signing.sh::test_sign_missing_key
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Discovers and runs all test_*.sh files
- [ ] Produces per-test log files
- [ ] Outputs JSON summary
- [ ] Supports --ci mode
- [ ] Returns non-zero on any failure
- [ ] Supports timeout enforcement
- [ ] Documents all options in --help","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-30T18:35:23.062043997Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T23:51:52.522060465Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T23:51:52.521733399Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2lm","depends_on_id":"bd-130","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-30T18:35:23.062043997Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-2lz","title":"Fix installer template portability and verification logic","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-01-30T22:26:13.181300835Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-30T22:26:20.845239061Z","closed_at":"2026-01-30T22:26:20.845222029Z","close_reason":"Completed: updated installer template for portable tag parsing, strict checksum download failure, and artifact naming ext/binary support.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

@@ -728,6 +728,12 @@ test_live_build_darwin_native() {
         return
     fi
 
+    # Check Go toolchain on mmini
+    if ! timeout 5 ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=3 mmini 'command -v go' &>/dev/null; then
+        log_skip "Skipped (Go not available on mmini)"
+        return
+    fi
+
     setup_test_environment
 
     local tool_dir
@@ -763,6 +769,18 @@ test_live_build_windows_native() {
         return
     fi
 
+    # Verify SCP works to wlap (source sync must succeed for build)
+    local _scp_test
+    _scp_test=$(mktemp)
+    echo "test" > "$_scp_test"
+    if ! timeout 10 scp -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=3 "$_scp_test" wlap:/tmp/dsr_scp_test &>/dev/null; then
+        rm -f "$_scp_test"
+        log_skip "Skipped (SCP to wlap unavailable)"
+        return
+    fi
+    rm -f "$_scp_test"
+    ssh -o BatchMode=yes -o ConnectTimeout=3 wlap 'del C:\tmp\dsr_scp_test 2>nul' &>/dev/null || true
+
     setup_test_environment
 
     local tool_dir
